mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_yqyc_crm_group WHERE status = '有效' AND deleted_flag = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(revenue_amount), 0) AS total FROM t_yqyc_biz_group_revenue_monthly WHERE revenue_month LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '%')

SELECT g.bu_org_id AS buOrgId, o.org_name AS buName, COALESCE(SUM(r.revenue_amount), 0) AS amount FROM t_yqyc_biz_group_revenue_monthly r JOIN t_yqyc_crm_group g ON r.group_id = g.id JOIN t_yqyc_sys_org o ON g.bu_org_id = o.id WHERE r.revenue_month = #{month} AND g.deleted_flag = 0 GROUP BY g.bu_org_id, o.org_name ORDER BY amount DESC

SELECT r.service_id AS serviceId, s.service_name AS serviceName, COALESCE(SUM(r.revenue_amount), 0) AS amount FROM t_yqyc_biz_group_revenue_monthly r JOIN t_yqyc_biz_service s ON r.service_id = s.id WHERE r.revenue_month = #{month} GROUP BY r.service_id, s.service_name ORDER BY amount DESC

SELECT revenue_month AS month, COALESCE(SUM(revenue_amount), 0) AS amount FROM t_yqyc_biz_group_revenue_monthly WHERE revenue_month LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '%') GROUP BY revenue_month ORDER BY revenue_month
SELECT service_id AS serviceId, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS amount FROM t_yqyc_biz_bu_performance WHERE stat_month = #{month} GROUP BY service_id

SELECT p.bu_org_id AS buOrgId, o.org_name AS buName, p.service_id AS serviceId, COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) AS amount FROM t_yqyc_biz_bu_performance p JOIN t_yqyc_sys_org o ON p.bu_org_id = o.id WHERE p.stat_month = #{month} GROUP BY p.bu_org_id, o.org_name, p.service_id

SELECT r.revenue_month AS month, COALESCE(SUM(r.revenue_amount), 0) AS amount FROM t_yqyc_biz_group_revenue_monthly r JOIN t_yqyc_crm_group g ON r.group_id = g.id WHERE g.bu_org_id = #{buOrgId} AND r.revenue_month LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '%') GROUP BY r.revenue_month ORDER BY r.revenue_month

SELECT stat_month AS month, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS amount FROM t_yqyc_biz_bu_performance WHERE bu_org_id = #{buOrgId} AND service_id = #{serviceId} AND stat_month LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '%') GROUP BY stat_month ORDER BY stat_month
SELECT id AS buOrgId, org_name AS buName FROM t_yqyc_sys_org WHERE org_type = '网格' AND status = '启用' ORDER BY sort_no, id
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_yqyc_crm_group WHERE is_key_customer = 1 AND status = '有效' AND deleted_flag = 0
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT parent_group_id) FROM t_yqyc_crm_group_relation WHERE relation_type = '统付'
